The good news is, with home physio, it’s often easier to stick to the schedule since you eliminate travel barriers. Your therapist will work with you to determine the optimal frequency and total number of sessions so that you recover as quickly and safely as possible. And don’t worry, you’ll likely start to feel some positive changes within the first few visits, which will motivate you to keep going. Home sessions mean you can start therapy as soon as you’re discharged (sometimes even the next day), which is critical for a successful recovery. We liaise, if needed, with your surgeon or doctor’s recommendations to ensure the rehab plan is on the right track. Besides orthopedic surgeries, we also handle rehab after spine surgeries (like a laminectomy or disc procedure) and cardiac surgeries (where breathing exercises and mobility training might be needed). The frequency of visits will depend on your surgeon’s advice — often daily or alternate-day sessions initially. Our goal is to help you regain your independence and function as quickly and safely as possible, all under professional guidance at home.

  • How long is each physiotherapy session at home, and how many sessions will I need?

    A typical home physiotherapy session usually lasts about 45 minutes to 1 hour. The first session (assessment) might be around 60 minutes since the physiotherapist is evaluating your condition and beginning the initial treatment. Subsequent sessions are often 45 minutes each, focusing on exercises, stretches, and therapy techniques tailored to you. The number of sessions you’ll need depends on your specific condition and goals. For example, a mild sprain or acute back strain might require a few sessions over a couple of weeks to see significant improvement. On the other hand, chronic issues like spondylitis or rehabilitation after a major surgery might need several weeks or months of therapy. Typically, your physiotherapist will give you an estimated therapy duration during the first visit after assessment. Many patients might start with a plan of, say, 10 sessions over 3-4 weeks, and then progress is reviewed. Some patients achieve their goals in those sessions, while others might continue with additional sessions or a maintenance program for long-term conditions. Frequency of sessions per week can also vary, often it’s about 2-3 sessions per week to start (allowing rest days for recovery), but in some cases daily sessions are recommended (e.g., immediately post-surgery or in intensive rehab situations). Remember, consistency is key in physiotherapy. We’ll work with you to determine the optimal schedule so you get the best results as fast as possible. And don’t worry, you’ll start noticing improvements often within the first few sessions, which motivates you to keep going!

For example, a minor muscle strain might require around 3-5 sessions, whereas a post-surgical rehabilitation or stroke recovery could involve 10-15+ sessions for full restoration of strength and mobility. When you begin therapy with us, our physiotherapist will assess your condition and provide a tailored plan along with an estimate of how many sessions you may need. We set realistic goals and monitor your progress closely, adjusting the plan as you improve. Rest assured, our aim is to help you recover as quickly and safely as possible, without any unnecessary sessions.

  • Can I get a same-day physiotherapy home visit in Koramangala?

    Yes, we do our best to accommodate same-day appointments in Koramangala whenever possible. We understand that pain or injuries can sometimes require immediate attention. With a team of physiotherapists located across Bangalore, including the Koramangala area, we can often send a therapist to your home on the day you contact us (subject to availability). To increase the chances of a same-day slot, it’s best to call early in the day. Our team will check the schedule and assign a qualified physio to visit you as soon as possible. Even if same-day is not available, we will schedule you at the earliest next slot. Your health and comfort are our priority, so we strive for prompt service.

  • Do you treat sports injuries at home in Koramangala?

    Yes, we provide sports physiotherapy at home for clients in Koramangala. Whether you’re dealing with a sprained ankle from a basketball game or a tennis elbow from long matches, our sports injury specialists can help. We come equipped with therapy tools like resistance bands, balance trainers, and cold packs to manage your injury. Treatment may include pain relief techniques, guided exercises to restore strength and flexibility, and advice on injury prevention. We have helped runners, gym-goers, and sports enthusiasts in Koramangala get back to their activities safely. Our physiotherapist will also tailor a rehab program that fits your routine, so you can recover without missing out on too much of your training or work schedule.

  • What qualifications do the physiotherapists in your Koramangala team have?

    All our physiotherapists are highly qualified and licensed to practice. Each therapist on our Koramangala team holds a Bachelor’s degree in Physiotherapy (BPT) at minimum, and many have a Master’s (MPT) in specialized fields like Orthopedics or Neurology. They are registered professionals with years of clinical experience. Additionally, our physios undergo regular training and stay updated on the latest treatment techniques and medical advancements. When you invite a Physio At Your Doorstep therapist to your home, you are in capable hands – our team has expertise in handling everything from simple sprains to complex rehabilitation cases. We pride ourselves on a blend of strong medical knowledge and a caring approach, so you get both expertise and empathy during your treatment.

title.rendered: Best Physiotherapist in Senapati Bapat Road, Pune – Home Physio Care

content.rendered:
Best Physiotherapist in Senapati Bapat Road, Pune – Home Physio Care

Expert Physiotherapy Care at Your Doorstep in Senapati Bapat Road

Situated in Pune’s heart, Senapati Bapat Road (often called S.B. Road) is a bustling corridor lined with landmarks like Chattushringi Temple on the hill and Abhiruchi Mall at Shivajinagar. This central location is convenient for many Pune residents: it connects the downtown areas (Deccan Gymkhana, Fergusson College Road) with western neighborhoods (Karve Nagar, Model Colony, Baner). Patients in these areas increasingly seek home physiotherapy services for convenience and comfort. At-home therapy on S.B. Road means your physiotherapist comes to you – saving travel time on busy Pune streets, especially around landmarks like KEM Hospital, Ganeshkhind (Pune University), and Pune Station. Our expert physiotherapists are licensed, experienced, and use portable equipment to replicate clinic-quality treatment in your home. (Physiotherapy employs exercise, manual techniques, etc.) Choosing home care on Senapati Bapat Road ensures you recover safely in your familiar environment, whether you’re near the Ganpati circle or heading toward Shivajinagar.

 

Why Choose Home Physiotherapy on Senapati Bapat Road?

Choosing home physiotherapy in Senapati Bapat road comes with several key benefits that make your rehabilitation smoother and faster:

Convenience & Time-Saving at Your Doorstep

No need to commute. Avoid parking hassles at KEM Hospital or traffic at Karve Road – our therapist comes to your doorstep. This saves time and reduces the effort of coordinating travel, especially after surgery or injury.

Personalized One-on-One Attention

Your sessions are entirely focused on you, with the therapist’s undivided attention. We tailor exercises and manual therapy to your condition and pace (like stretching, strengthening, massage, hot/cold therapy), often using simple home equipment (bands, balls).

Safe, Hygienic & Comfortable Care

Being treated at home can be safer, especially for seniors or post-op patients. You eliminate travel risks (no overcrowded buses or hospital stairs) and minimize infection exposure.

Faster Recovery at Home

Regular sessions at home promote consistency. Studies indicate that rehab at home can be just as effective as, or even more effective than, clinic rehab for conditions like chronic back pain.

Home Physiotherapy Services in Senapati Bapat Road

We provide a wide range of physiotherapy services at home in Dange Chowk, Pune.

Post-Surgery Rehabilitation

We assist recovery after surgeries (joint replacement, ACL or knee surgeries, spine operations, etc.). Early rehab helps prevent stiffness and regain motion. At-home care means gentle movement can start soon after hospital discharge, which research shows improves outcomes.

Learn More

Orthopedic Physiotherapy

For bone, joint, and muscle conditions (arthritis, fractures, back/neck pain, shoulder injuries, carpal tunnel, etc.) we provide targeted therapy. For example, knee arthritis is managed with range-of-motion and strengthening exercises; back pain with posture training and core work.

Learn More

Neurological Physiotherapy

If you have a neurological condition or injury (stroke, multiple sclerosis, Parkinson’s, cerebral palsy, post-concussion, spinal cord injuries), we focus on neuro-rehab exercises. This may include gait training, balance work, and neurodevelopmental techniques to improve motor control.

Learn More

Sports Injury Rehabilitation

For athletes and active patients on S.B. Road, we treat sports-related injuries (sprains, ACL/ligament tears, rotator cuff injuries, overuse injuries). Therapy includes soft tissue mobilization, joint mobilizations, and sport-specific strengthening or agility drills when appropriate.

Learn More

Geriatric Physiotherapy

Our therapists are experienced working with older adults. Common senior issues include osteoarthritis, balance impairments, osteoporosis-related pain, and frailty. We perform gentle exercise therapy, balance and fall-prevention training, and functional exercises.

Learn More

Pediatric Physiotherapy

Children and adolescents sometimes need physiotherapy too – whether it’s to recover from injuries or to address developmental concerns. Our pediatric physiotherapy service brings playful, child-friendly rehabilitation exercises right to your home in Dange Chowk.

Learn More

How It Works?

Our physiotherapy team in Senapati Bapat Road, Pune is highly qualified and experienced across all areas of rehabilitation. Each therapist holds a recognized degree in Physiotherapy (BPT, with many also holding MPT) and is fully licensed to practice. Over the years, we’ve helped countless patients in Pune regain mobility, recover faster, and live pain-free lives. Now, we bring the same expertise and compassionate care to Senapati Bapat Road, ensuring your health and recovery are always in trusted hands.

Starting your home physiotherapy in Senapati Bapat Road is simple:

Book a Consultation

Call us or fill out our online form to explain your needs. We’ll schedule a visit at your convenience.

Home Visit & Assessment

On the first home visit, the physiotherapist conducts a thorough evaluation (medical history, pain levels, mobility tests). We create a customized treatment plan based on your condition.

Treatment & Recovery

We visit regularly (typically 45–60 min sessions) to provide hands-on therapy, guided exercises, and monitor progress. We bring any needed equipment (bands, massage tools, TENS units, etc.).

Ongoing Support

Your therapist tracks improvement and adjusts the plan. We also educate you on home exercises and self-care. Even after formal rehab ends, we’re available for check-ins to ensure lasting recovery.

Patient Testimonials & Success Stories

Coverage & Nearby Areas

We cover Senapati Bapat Road and adjacent Pune localities. Key service areas include:

  • Senapati Bapat Road (Chattushringi, Abhiruchi Mall, Symphony): Treating residents and businesses along SB Road, including traffic-heavy sections near KEM Hospital and Pune Station.
  • Shivajinagar / Bajirao Road: Just east of SB Road, near landmarks like Pune Municipal Corporation and MG Metro – we serve homes and offices here, easing gymnastic injuries or urban commute aches.
  • Model Colony / Karve Nagar: South and southwest of SB Road, a mix of housing and shops – many of our senior clients (arthritis management) and post-op patients come from these areas.
  • Deccan Gymkhana / Fergusson College Road: South of SB Road (Deccan area), famous for sports facilities – athletes with sprains or back pain near Poona Club or FC Road rely on our home visits.
  • University Area / Ganeshkhind: North of SB Road, including Savitribai Phule Pune University and National Games Village – students and faculty often book us for neck/back strain after long study sessions.
  • Karve / Warje Road: West and slightly south (beyond Model Colony), including newer high-rises – residents with limited clinic access, such as pre/post-natal moms and children with developmental needs, get therapy at home.
  • Aundh & Sangvi (North-West Pune): Though a bit farther, we frequently serve patients on Sangamwadi Road and Aundh with sports injuries or post-surgical needs.
  • Other Areas (Kothrud, Baner outskirts): If you’re near these zones or between them and SB Road, check with us – many patients in Kothrud and Baner also benefit from home therapy.

Each bullet highlights proximity or local landmark (e.g. “Abhiruchi Mall” or “Fergusson College”) to anchor relevance. We aim to cover all nearby regions of western Pune – if you’re unsure if we reach your street, just ask us.

Book a Physiotherapy Session Today

Ready to start your recovery at home in Senapati Bapat Road, Pune? Contact us today to book a physiotherapist. now

physioatyourdoorstep24x7@gmail.com

Sector 3, HSR Layout, Bangalore, 560102

Frequently Asked Question

  • How do I book a home physiotherapy session?

    You can call us directly at +91-82337-87737, or use our online contact form (see “Book a Physiotherapy Session” above). Mention your location (Senapati Bapat Road) and condition. We’ll propose a date/time and discuss any details upfront. Appointments typically available early mornings and evenings for busy patients.

  • Is home physiotherapy as effective as clinic therapy?

    Yes. Research shows home-based rehabilitation often yields outcomes equal to or better than clinic programs. In-home therapy avoids commute stress and allows more focus on your care. (Some studies found patients improved more with consistent home sessions for chronic conditions.) We bring all necessary tools so you receive the same level of care as a clinic, with personalized attention.

  • What conditions can be treated at home?

    Virtually any condition handled in a clinic can be treated at home. This includes orthopedic pain (back, neck, joint injuries), sports injuries, neurological rehab (stroke, Parkinson’s), cardiopulmonary issues (post-heart-attack recovery, breathing problems), pediatric needs, and post-surgical rehab. We customize the program to your diagnosis and goals.

  • How many sessions will I need?

    It varies by your condition’s severity and goals. Some patients may only need 4–6 sessions for a minor sprain; others require 2–3 months for post-surgical rehab or chronic conditions. During the first assessment, your therapist will estimate a treatment timeline. We focus on achieving home exercise independence – ultimately, therapy continues until you’ve met your goals. Our goal is to discharge you when you’re fully recovered, with options for follow-up check-ins.

  • What is the cost of home physiotherapy in Pune?

    In Pune, a typical single at-home physiotherapy session (45–60 min) costs around ₹700–₹1,000. The exact fee depends on the treatment type and session length. We are transparent: the quote is given upfront. Package plans (e.g. 10 sessions) often lower the per-session rate. Remember, home care may be slightly higher than a single clinic visit cost, but it includes one-on-one service and you save on travel time and expenses. We pride ourselves on offering affordable, no-surprise pricing worth the value of recovery.

  • Is home physiotherapy safe for seniors and post-op patients?

    Absolutely. In fact, it can be safer than traveling to a clinic. Without commuting and with our therapist assisting every step, the risks of falls or infection exposure are minimized. Our professionals ensure exercises are done correctly to avoid strain. For older patients, we progress slowly, use supports (chairs/walkers), and clear the home area for safe movement. “Physiotherapy is very safe and effective,” with only minimal risks like mild muscle soreness. We also check your home setup beforehand (enough space, lighting, etc.) to make sure your environment is as safe as possible.

  • How should I prepare for a home session?

    Just clear a small space (living room or bedroom area) for the therapist to work. Wear loose, comfortable clothes (t-shirt and shorts or track pants). Keep a bottle of water and towel handy. Gather any relevant medical reports (like X-rays or surgeon’s notes) to share. We bring portable equipment, but if you have items like a yoga mat or exercise ball, have those available. Basically, just make sure the area is uncluttered and you have easy access to sit or lie down. Your therapist will guide you from there.

About us

  • Home

About us Best Physiotherapist in Bangalore at Home

Welcome to Physio at Your Doorstep, where we believe in making high-quality physiotherapy services accessible, convenient, and tailored to your unique needs. Founded by Dr. Atharva Mishra, a highly skilled and passionate physiotherapist, our mission is to bring personalized, professional care directly to your home, making recovery and physical wellness easier than ever.

Dr. Atharva Mishra, with years of expertise in the field of physiotherapy, established Physio at Your Doorstep with a simple but powerful vision: to provide compassionate, effective physiotherapy care in the comfort and convenience of your own space. Whether you’re recovering from surgery, managing chronic pain, or looking to improve mobility, Dr. Mishra and his dedicated team are here to help you achieve your goals with tailored treatment plans.

At Physio at Your Doorstep, we are committed to helping you move better, feel better, and live better. Dr. Atharva Mishra and his team bring their expertise, compassion, and dedication to every session, ensuring you get the best care possible, right at your doorstep.

Experience the difference with Physio at Your Doorstep – because your health and convenience matter. Let us help you take the first step towards a pain-free, active lifestyle!

Book an Appointment

Why Choose Us

Convenience

We understand the challenges of finding time for appointments. That’s why we bring our expert physiotherapists directly to you, whether at home, work, or any location of your choice.

Save money & time

Schedule your appointment as per your convenience with no stress of travelling and waiting.

Holistic Healing

Our focus is on overall wellness, ensuring that you not only recover from injuries but also improve your long-term physical health and mobility.

Individualized care

We understand that each patient is different and so are their requirements. That’s why we provide you with personalized care plan that caters to your needs.

Patient-centric approach

Building a therapeutic relationship with the patient and family via effective communication to facilitate patient participation and better outcomes.

We are Physio Experts We Are Committed To Your Health

Take the first step toward better health and a pain-free life with Physio at Your Doorstep—personalized, expert care at your convenience.

Book an Appointment

Meet Our Founder

Dr. Atharva Mishra -The Vision Behind Physio at Your Doorstep
  • Dr. Atharva Mishra -The Vision Behind Physio at Your Doorstep

Dr. Atharva Mishra Chief Physiotherapist

Dr Atharva Mishra is the Founder and Chief Physiotherapist at “Physio At Your Doorstep”, which is a platform that provides physiotherapy care to people at the comfort of their home throughout Bangalore.

He specializes in ACL Rehabilitation, Post-Surgical Physiotherapy, Post-Operative stiffness, Sports Injuries, Shoulder Rehabilitation, Manual Therapy and mobilization.

He is familiar with wide range of techniques and approaches which provides in-depth opportunities for him to treat a variety of diseases by means of an integrated and holistic approach.

Dr Atharva is very passionate to help people come out of their long standing pain. He feels that constant nagging pain not only cause physical discomfort but it also results in a lot of irritation and low energy. His philosophy is that people are more fulfilled and happy in both professional and personal life if they are free of pain.

He founded “Physio At Your Doorstep” so that he can provide the best care to each and every individual at the comfort of home.

Credentials and Qualifications:

He has completed his Bachelors of Physiotherapy (BPT) from Govt. Physiotherapy College, Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India, affiliated to the Rajasthan University of Health Sciences (RUHS) and Masters in Sports Physiotherapy from Jaipur Physiotherapy College which is affiliated to Maharaj Vinayak Global University (MVGU).

Dr. Atharva Mishra has done numerous certified training courses, such as Dry Needling (DNT), Kinesiotaping (KTP), Kinetic Chain Activation Technique(KCAT) and BFRT.

Other Expertise
Stroke Rehabilitation
Manual Therapy and Mobilisation
Vestibular Rehabilitation
Spinal Manipulation
Associations
He is an active member of Rajasthani Physiotherapy Association (RPA).
He is also an Active member of NGO (ASHRAYE – An Initiative by Physios).

Dr. Manasvi Kanjolia Chief Physiotherapist (Pune)

Dr. Manasvi Kanjolia is the Chief Physiotherapist for the Pune region at Physio At Your Doorstep. She holds a Bachelor’s degree in Physiotherapy (B.P.T.) and brings extensive expertise in post-surgical, neurological, musculoskeletal, and orthopedic rehabilitation.

Known for her patient-centered approach, Dr. Manasvi focuses on restoring mobility, managing pain, and enhancing overall quality of life through evidence-based physiotherapy. Her strength lies in designing personalized treatment plans that deliver measurable and lasting results.

With years of experience and compassionate care, she ensures every patient receives the highest standard of physiotherapy in the comfort and convenience of their own home — helping them regain independence and confidence in movement.
